subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Dear Alice,

Thank you for reaching out from Partner Corp. I appreciate your interest in exploring potential collaboration between our organizations.

I'd be happy to schedule an introductory call. Here are some available slots:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00  
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these times works best for you, and I'll send a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for internal contact information, I'm unable to share direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering. For any official communications or technical discussions, please refer to our public website at www.company.internal for general contact information and appropriate channels.

Looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company Internal
